merriment-social.name: Merriment Social
merriment-social.notes: Consistent positive reception. Wedding/event guests very enthusiastic. Minor note: 3% surcharge caused friction with one guest — staff handled it well.

flags.author: Korinne Mack
issues: solo diner ignored by bartender for 45 min
flags.suggested_response: Thank you for your honest feedback, Korinne. We're sorry your experience didn't match our standards — every guest deserves attentive service, regardless of party size. We'll address the bar service directly with our team. We'd love to make it right if you're willing to give us another chance.

flags.author: Jim Whitaker
issues: crust described as dry and stale
flags.suggested_response: Hi Jim — thank you for the detailed feedback. We're glad the atmosphere, staff, and spring rolls landed well! The crust and sauce are something we take seriously and we'd love to hear more about your visit. Please reach out to us directly so we can make it right.

loon-room.name: The Loon Room
loon-room.notes: Strong cocktail program reception. Valentine's Day special got 4 stars — charcuterie and single-entree-per-couple policy noted as friction points to address.
